$comment: Cursor hooks — place as <project>/.cursor/hooks.json (or ~/.cursor/hooks.json). afterFileEdit records touched files. Cursor's stop hook cannot block, so the stop command wraps rot-canary-stop.js: it converts the Claude-style {decision:'block', reason} output into Cursor's {followup_message} so the scan request is submitted as the next turn. Adjust the CoalMine path in both commands.
